title: Ival Dhaana Lyrics Veeram Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Ival Dhaana
Singer: Sagar, Shreya Ghosal
Movie: Veeram
Music: Devi Sri Prasad
Lyrics: Viveka

Kannum kannu thoorikolla
vetkam karai meeri chella
akkam pakkam yaarumilla
haiyayaiyo ennaagumo.

nenjam nemjam muttikolla
acham mattum nettuthalla
solla oru vaarthai illa
haiyayaiyo ennaagumo.

Andha vaanavillin paadhi
vennilavin meedhi
pen uruvil vandhaale
ival dhaana .. oh ival dhaana..

Mazhai minnal ena modhi
mandhirangal odhi
en kanavai vendraaney
ivan dhaana .. ivan dhaana..

Potti potu en vizhi rendum
unnai paarka mundhi chellum.
Imaigal kooda edhirinil vandhaal
sumaigal aagudhey.

Kannum kannu thoorikolla
vetkam karai meeri chella
akkam pakkam yaarumilla
haiyayaiyo ennaagumo.

nenjam nemjam muttikolla
acham mattum nettuthalla
solla oru vaarthai illa
haiyayaiyo ennaagumo.

Vina vina aayiram
adhan vidai ellaam un vizhiyiley.
vidai vidai adhu mudiviley
pala vina vandhaal adhu kadhaley.

Thaniye nee veedhiyile
nadandhaal adhu perazhgu.
Oru poo kortha noolaaga
theruve angu therigiradhu.

Kaaichal vandhu neechal
podum aaraai maarinen.
ivan dhaana .. ivan dhaana..

Kudai kudai ondru yendhiye
varum mazhai ondrai naan paarkiren.
ival illaa oru vazhkaye oru pilai
endru naan unargiren.

adadaa un kan asaivum
adhiraa un punnagaiyum.
udaney en uyir pisayum
udalil oru peyar asayum.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Ival Dhaana?

The song explores themes of love and longing, capturing the emotions of a romantic relationship.

Who are the singers of this song?

Sagar and Shreya Ghoshal lend their voices to this beautiful duet.

Who composed the music for Veeram?

The music for Veeram was composed by Devi Sri Prasad.

What is the significance of the song in the movie?

The song is pivotal in expressing the romantic tension and emotional depth between the lead characters.

When was the song released?

The song was released in 2013.
enrichedMetadata.summary: Ival Dhaana is a melodious duet from the movie Veeram, capturing the essence of romance and longing. Sung by Sagar and Shreya Ghoshal, the song beautifully conveys the emotions of love and the anticipation of being with a loved one. Viveka's poignant lyrics, combined with Devi Sri Prasad's soulful composition, create a memorable musical experience. The song plays a significant role in the film, highlighting the emotional connection between the lead characters.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Ival Dhaana from the movie Veeram is a captivating duet that beautifully blends the soulful voices of Sagar and Shreya Ghoshal with Devi Sri Prasad's enchanting music. The song's romantic and slightly melancholic tone makes it perfect for intimate moments. Experience the magic of Viveka's lyrics as they weave a tale of love and longing.
stanzaMeanings: Eyes shyly look away, crossing the line of shyness, no one is around, oh what will happen.
The heart is pounding with fear, unable to express a word, oh what will happen.
She came like a half moon in the sky, is it her? Oh, is it her?
Like lightning and rain, casting spells, he conquered my dreams, is it him? Is it him?
Competing, my eyes move forward to see you. Even the eyelids become burdens when they come in front.
Is it her? Oh, is it her?
Eyes shyly look away, crossing the line of shyness, no one is around, oh what will happen.
The heart is pounding with fear, unable to express a word, oh what will happen.
Thousands of questions, all answers in your eyes. When questions end, love begins.
Walking alone on the street is a grand sight. Like a thread with a flower, the street recognizes it.
Fever comes and goes, I have changed. Is it him? Is it him?
Holding an umbrella, I watch the rain. Without her, life feels like a child.
Oh, your eye movements and your smile. Instantly, my life stirs, a name moves within my body.
Like a pattern blown away by the wind, I forget yesterday.
Is it her? Oh, is it her?
